cards.rules_text: Repeat this process three times: Flip a coin. If heads, attack 1. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 1 health. If they chose a card they control, remove an endurance counter from it.)[/i]
Unexert each silver you control.
Put each silver card in your discard into play under your control.
At the start of your turn, put a silver card from your discard into play under your control.

{1}: Attack 1. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 1 health. If they chose a card they control, remove an endurance counter from it.)[/i]

Limitless [i](A deck can have any number of this card.)[/i]
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Base Silver: Add {1}.

At the end of your turn, if you have 10 hunger, draw a card and attack 2. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 2 health. If they chose a card they control, remove 2 endurance counters from it.)[/i]
Whenever you draw a card, you gain 1 hunger.
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Burst Silver: Add {2}.
Exert: Look at the top card of your deck. You may put it into your discard.
You gain 2 health.

Draw a card.
When you discard this card, draw a card.
Each player discards their hand and draws seven cards.

Obstruct [i](This can block attacks.)[/i]
Targeted [i](You can't choose yourself for opponent's attacks.)[/i]
Exert a follower you control, Remove an endurance counter from that follower: Put two endurance counters on Defensible Encampment.
Remove an endurance counter from a card of your choice.
Put a card in play into its owner's hand.
Each player discards two cards.

Exert: Attack 3. This attack can't be obstructed. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 3 health. If they chose a card they control, remove 3 endurance counters from it.)[/i]

{2}, Exert: Attack 1. You gain 1 health. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 1 health. If they chose a card they control, remove an endurance counter from it.)[/i]

Whenever you attack, flip a coin. If heads, put an endurance counter on Drakken, Khaos Incarnate.
Exert: Attack X, where X is the number of endurance counters on Drakken, Khaos Incarnate. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose X health. If they chose a card they control, remove X endurance counters from it.)[/i]

Obstruct [i](This can block attacks.)[/i]
Whenever one or more endurance counters are removed from Duelist, if Duelist is still in play, attack X, where X is the number of endurance counters removed. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose X health. If they chose a card they control, remove X endurance counters from it.)[/i]
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Edible Silver: Add {1}. You gain 1 hunger.
Choose a player. That player destroys a non-silver card they control.
Destroy a card of your choice.

Eternal Silver enters play exerted with three overexertion counters. [i](If a card with an overexertion counter would become unexerted, remove one from it instead.)[/i]
Exert: Add {1}.
Destroy all cards.
Exert: Each player gains 1 hunger.

When Fool's Silver enters play, each opponent creates a token that's a copy of it.
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Fool's Silver: Add {2}.
Discard a card. If you do, draw two cards.

Exert: Attack 4. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 4 health. If they chose a card they control, remove 4 endurance counters from it.)[/i]
Put up to two cards from your discard on top of your deck in any order.
Obstruct [i](This can block attacks.)[/i]
Exert: You gain 1 hunger.

Exert: Add {1}.
Discard two cards: Unexert Illusory Silver.
At the end of your turn, destroy Illusory Silver.
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Imperial Silver, Discard a card: Add {2}.
Exert: You gain 1 hunger.

Exert: Attack X, where X is the number of endurance counters on Karaxunnos, the Mirrored Abolishment.
Other cards you control enter play with an additional endurance counter for each other card you control that shares a name with them.
{7}: Create a token that's a copy of a card you control.
Obstruct [i](This can block attacks.)[/i]
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Library: Draw card.
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Loaf of Bread: You gain 2 hunger.

Obstruct [i](This can block attacks.)[/i]
Targeted [i](You can't choose yourself for opponent's attacks.)[/i]
If a counter would be removed from Lucky Fool, instead flip a coin. If you win, don't remove that counter.
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Lucky Silver: Flip a coin. If heads, add {1}.
Exert: Add {1}.

Mark card [i](When this card enters play, attach it to a card in play.)[/i]
At the end of your turn, create a token that's a copy of the marked card.
Whenever an opponent attacks, remove an endurance counter from Mark of Karaxunnos.
Whenever an opponent discards a card, you draw a card.
{2}, Exert: Choose a player. That player discards a card.
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Pomegranate, Discard a card: You gain 1 hunger. Draw a card.
Each opponent discards two cards.

Exert any number of followers you control. For each follower exerted this way, attack 2. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 2 health. If they chose a card they control, remove 2 endurance counters from it.)[/i]

Limitless [i](A deck can have any number of this card.)[/i]
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Rations: You gain 3 hunger.
Destroy a card you control, then create two tokens that are copies of it, except they enter play with only 1 endurance counter.
Draw two cards.
Cards your opponents play enter play with 1 less endurance counter. This effect can't reduce the amount of endurance counters they enter play with below 1.
When Sacrifice Fodder is destroyed, draw a card.
Each player draws two cards.
Obstruct [i](This can block attacks.)[/i]
Obstruct [i](This can block attacks.)[/i]
Cards you play with X in their mana cost cost {X} less to play, where X is the number of endurance counters on The Shifting One.
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Shifting Rations: You gain 3 hunger.

Attack X. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose X health. If they chose a card they control, remove X endurance counters from it.)[/i]
Obstruct [i](This can block attacks.)[/i]

{2}, Exert: Attack X, where X is the number of endurance counters on Shifting Warrior. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose X health. If they chose a card they control, remove X endurance counters from it.)[/i]

Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Shifty Silver: Add {1}.
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Shifty Silver: Add {2}. Spend this mana only to pay for {X} costs.
If a player would attack, they instead attack for that amount minus 1.
Other cards enter play with 1 additional endurance counter.
Each player discards a card at the start of their turn.
Each player draws an additional card at the start of each of their turns.
Other cards have obstruct. [i](This can block attacks.)[/i]
If a player would attack, they instead attack for that amount plus 1.
Each player loses 1 less hunger at the start of their turn.
Other cards enter play with 1 less endurance counter.

Slow Silver enters play exerted.
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Slow Silver: Add {1}.
Destroy a card with cost {3} or greater.

{2}, Exert: Attack 1. If a player loses health from this attack, look at the top card of their library. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 1 health. If they chose a card they control, remove an endurance counter from it.)[/i]

Whenever you gain hunger, put an endurance counter on Starving Masses.
Exert, Destroy Starving Masses: Attack X, where X is the number of endurance counters on it. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose X health. If they chose a card they control, remove X endurance counters from it.)[/i]

Attack 2. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 2 health. If they chose a card they control, remove 2 endurance counters from it.)[/i]
Each player discards a card, then draws a card.
Cards you play cost {1} less to play.
A card of your choice gains obstruct and targeted until your next turn. [i](It can block attacks. Its controller can't choose themselves for their opponent's attacks.)[/i]

At the beginning of your turn, attack 1. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 1 health. If they chose a card they control, remove an endurance counter from it.)[/i]

Obstruct [i](This can block attacks.)[/i]
{1}, Exert: Attack 1. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 1 health. If they chose a card they control, remove an endurance counter from it.)[/i]

Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Vial of Blood: Choose one —
• You gain 1 health.
• Put an endurance counter on a follower you control.
Obstruct [i](This can block attacks.)[/i]

{1}, Exert, Exert X other followers: Attack X. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose X health. If they chose a card they control, remove X endurance counters from it.)[/i]

{1}, Exert: Attack 1. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 1 health. If they chose a card they control, remove an endurance counter from it.)[/i]
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Wayfarer's Silver: Add {1}. Look at the top card of your deck. You may put it into your discard.
